resources.string: Hey! Here is a link to download PodHopper. I\'m really enjoying it and thought you might too. \nhttps://podhopper.app
If on, PodHopper will go back a little in episodes you resume so you can catch up more comfortably.
PodHopper is now refreshing all your podcast images, this will happen in the background and may take a little time.
Some shows have custom artwork for certain episodes. Enable this option and PodHopper will display them instead of the show’s artwork.
Attempt to restore any downloaded files if they are missing in the PodHopper app.
Prioritizing seek accuracy can significantly slow down seek responsiveness and cause PodHopper to consume more data.
To get notifications from PodHopper, you\'ll need to turn them on in your device settings.

The most common cause is that you have an ad-blocker configured on your phone or network. You’ll need to unblock this domain to download podcasts. Please note PodHopper doesn’t host or choose where podcasts are hosted, that’s up to the author of the show and is out of our control.
Podcast authors host episode files in various hosting providers not managed by PodHopper.
Say goodbye to banner ads and more with PodHopper Plus
Subscribe to PodHopper Plus for extended stats, bookmarks, folders, chapter selection, and more ways to dig into your listening habits
Get PodHopper Plus
Denied! PodHopper can\'t play this file, please check your storage permissions.
Get PodHopper Plus
Log into PodHopper on a paired Android phone.
The next time you open PodHopper on your watch and have a network connection, you will be logged in.
If you are having trouble, make sure your phone is running the same version of PodHopper as your watch (%s)
Shows while PodHopper is downloading episodes
Shows notifications about new features, updates, and handy tips to help you optimize your PodHopper experience
Shows notifications about exclusive offers, discounts, and promotions to help you make the most of your PodHopper experience
Shows while PodHopper is playing audio
Switching from another app? Bring all your favorite shows to PodHopper.
Notifications are the best way to keep track of new episodes, get recommendations of new shows and tips about PodHopper.
PodHopper can import podcasts from OPML files, so if your current app can export an OPML file, you can follow these steps:
Use your phone\’s \“Share\” menu to send the file to PodHopper. Alternatively, import the file from PodHopper\’ \“Import & export OPML\” settings menu.
PodHopper user
Special PodHopper app icons
The undying gratitude of everyone here at PodHopper
Make PodHopper yours by selecting your favorite podcasts or import them from another podcast player. You can always do this later.
Special PodHopper app icons
The undying gratitude of everyone here at PodHopper

Upgrade your account anytime to continue using PodHopper Plus

PodHopper Query Up Next Episodes
Already have a PodHopper account?
This feature requires PodHopper Plus
Try PodHopper Plus free for %s
Want to listen to your own files?\nTap the + button to open them in PodHopper, and they’ll appear here.
Get PodHopper Plus to unlock this feature, plus lots more!
Help support PodHopper by upgrading your account

PodHopper values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect about you and why, what we may do with that information and how we handle it. It applies to the iOS and Android PodHopper apps, and the PodHopper web service with associated macOS and Windows apps (jointly and severally, the Service). By using the Service, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you turn on push notifications in the app, we store the push token Apple provides us in order to deliver those push notifications to your device. If you buy the web app we store a transaction id for your purchase. If you choose not to create an account, and don’t use push notifications, no data is stored about you on our servers. PodHopper web service also uses cookies and like technologies to keep you logged in. Should you choose to generate a support request from within the Service, we may generate an attachment containing additional data to assist in addressing your support request which you’re welcome to view prior to submission.
The PodHopper Web Player is now part of PodHopper Plus. As a thank you for your support, we’ve upgraded your account to PodHopper Plus for %s.
PodHopper Account
PodHopper newsletter
Create a PodHopper Account
A PodHopper account is required for PodHopper Plus. This ensures seamless listening across all your devices.\n\nCreate an account or sign in to redeem your access to PodHopper Plus.
Sign up for PodHopper Plus
Unable to link PodHopper account at this time. Please try again later.
You need to have a PodHopper account before you can connect with Sonos.
PodHopper And Sonos
Access to PodHopper Plus features will be locked
All files uploaded to your PodHopper account will be deleted
It looks like you subscribed to PodHopper Plus from an Android device
It looks like you subscribed to PodHopper Plus from the web
Welcome to PodHopper!
Welcome to PodHopper Plus!
Rate PodHopper
You are already a PodHopper Plus subscriber, there\'s no need to redeem any codes.
Your account has an active PodHopper Plus subscription. Please cancel this first before deleting your account.
PodHopper Forums
Please go to PodHopper\' forums (%1$s) where our support team can help you.
Get PodHopper Plus to unlock this feature and more!
Please pair your watch with a phone that has PodHopper installed to view your logs or contact support
Please pair your watch with a phone that has PodHopper installed before proceeding.
If you have podcasts in another app or service, PodHopper can import them from an OPML file.
PodHopper Offers

Hi,

Please find attached your freshly exported podcast list in an OPML file.

PodHopper Team
PodHopper - Backup of Podcast List
Allow us to link your PodHopper account to crash reports.
PodHopper will only refresh when you open the app.\n\nEpisode notifications and auto downloads will only happen when you open the app.
PodHopper will only sync your account when you open the app.
PodHopper will periodically check for new episodes and auto downloads in the background.
PodHopper will periodically sync your account in the background.
Preselect chapters and more with PodHopper Plus
Become a supporter for premium content, unique to PodHopper
Become a supporter for ad-free content, unique to PodHopper
Allow "PodHopper" to track your activity across other companies\' apps and websites?
Welcome to PodHopper
Welcome to PodHopper TV
Cancelling ends your PodHopper subscription.\nYour Google Play payment plan will continue.
All files uploaded to your PodHopper account will be deleted (but downloaded files on your mobile devices will remain).
Access to PodHopper Plus features will be locked after this date.
Enjoy one month of PodHopper Plus on us! The offer will be added to your current subscription.
Lock in a year of PodHopper Plus at half price with 12 monthly payments of %1$s. Your discounted installment plan begins after your current plan ends.
Pay %1$s now to lock in a year of PodHopper Plus at half price. Your discounted year begins after your current plan ends.
